---
title: "apr_2022"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup}
library(readxl)
library(tidyverse)
setwd("C:/git/metadata_handling")
```


```{r data import}
X2022_April <- read_excel("Data/Raw/2022 April.xlsx")
View(X2022_April)

X2022_April_b <- read_excel("Data/Raw/2022 April b.xlsx")
View(X2022_April_b)
```

```{r column name fixing}
april_cnames <- colname_recode(X2022_April)
april_b_cnames <- colname_recode(X2022_April_b)
```

```{r column content fixes}
april_clean <- april_cnames %>%
  mutate(`18s_Fastq_ID` = .$Other_seq_info)
```
